---
title: "Public Writing"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell">
  <section class="section-block">
    <h2 class="section-title">Recent Commentary</h2>
    <div class="writing-grid">
      <article class="writing-card">
        <img src="review%20or%20retention.jpg" alt="Clipping for Review or Retention.">
        <div class="writing-card-body">
          <p class="eyebrow">The Times of India</p>
          <h3>Review or Retention.</h3>
          <div class="meta-row tight">
            <span class="pill alt">Dec 2024</span>
            <a class="link-pill" href="review%20or%20retention.jpg">Open Clipping</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="writing-card">
        <img src="ladki%20bahin.jpg" alt="Clipping for Ladki, bahin...but ethnic groups, caste too.">
        <div class="writing-card-body">
          <p class="eyebrow">The Times of India</p>
          <h3>Ladki, bahin...but ethnic groups, caste too.</h3>
          <div class="meta-row tight">
            <span class="pill alt">Oct 2024</span>
            <a class="link-pill" href="ladki%20bahin.jpg">Open Clipping</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="writing-card">
        <img src="democracy%20on%20a%20slow%20march.jpg" alt="Clipping for Democracy's Slow March.">
        <div class="writing-card-body">
          <p class="eyebrow">The Times of India</p>
          <h3>Democracy's Slow March.</h3>
          <p class="writing-note">With <a href="https://alyssaheinze.github.io/">Alyssa Heinze</a></p>
          <div class="meta-row tight">
            <span class="pill alt">Oct 2024</span>
            <a class="link-pill" href="democracy%20on%20a%20slow%20march.jpg">Open Clipping</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="writing-card">
        <img src="maha%20questions%20from%20small%20allies.jpg" alt="Clipping for Maha Questions From Opposition's Small Allies.">
        <div class="writing-card-body">
          <p class="eyebrow">The Times of India</p>
          <h3>Maha Questions From Opposition's Small Allies.</h3>
          <div class="meta-row tight">
            <span class="pill alt">Sept 2024</span>
            <a class="link-pill" href="maha%20questions%20from%20small%20allies.jpg">Open Clipping</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="writing-card">
        <img src="maha%20gondhal.jpg" alt="Clipping for Maharashtra LS polls have never been muddier.">
        <div class="writing-card-body">
          <p class="eyebrow">The Times of India</p>
          <h3>Maharashtra LS polls have never been muddier.</h3>
          <p class="writing-note">With <a href="https://www.udel.edu/academics/colleges/cas/units/departments/anthropology/our-people/vikramaditya-thakur/">Vikramaditya Thakur</a></p>
          <div class="meta-row tight">
            <span class="pill alt">May 2024</span>
            <a class="link-pill" href="maha%20gondhal.jpg">Open Clipping</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section-block">
    <h2 class="section-title">Earlier Writing</h2>
    <div class="card-grid two-up">
      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>Why India's Plan for A New Parliament May Spell A Challenging Future For Its Democracy?</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>The McGill International Review, May 2021</em></p>
          <a class="link-pill" href="https://www.mironline.ca/why-indias-plan-for-a-new-parliament-may-spell-a-challenging-future-for-its-democracy/">Read Article</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>Education in India: A Duty Forsaken During COVID-19.</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>The McGill International Review, July 2021</em></p>
          <a class="link-pill" href="https://www.mironline.ca/education-in-india-a-right-forsaken-during-covid-19/">Read Article</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>Guardians, citizens and the prohibition of private possessions in Plato's Republic.</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>Liberalis Magazine, 2021</em></p>
          <a class="link-pill" href="https://mppsm15.medium.com/guardians-citizens-and-the-prohibition-of-private-possessions-in-platos-republic-bc97976abd9">Read Article</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="entry-card">
        <h3>Action as Addition: A Move Beyond Consequentializing.</h3>
        <div class="meta-row">
          <p class="meta-text"><em>Fragments: McGill Philosophy Journal, 2021</em></p>
          <a class="link-pill" href="https://00ff1226-c9ea-453e-baa6-e67819b43f30.filesusr.com/ugd/bc8784_cc48e86634aa4c4ca45aac27c1a3ee11.pdf">Open PDF</a>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
